highlights.text: It is also why I wrote on Wednesday March 11th at 4pm: “Bear Case Thursday: Begins on the failure of 6819”.
Friday morning, we lost it, triggering the bear case, and down we went.
I wrote Thursday at 4pm: “Bear case tomorrow: Begins below 6623.” We sold 100 points Friday from this trigger.
The morning after, price picked its path, and down we went going elevator down and beginning a 2 week period of sold bounces .
Every elevator down sell sees an equally violent squeeze the other way.
Those squeezes however, only occur when price triggers my core setup: The Failed Breakdown which occurs when price flushes a major low, traps shorts, then reverses.
This then setup - as always - a quality Failed Breakdown in the last half hour of trading.
I wrote Thursday at 4pm: “Failed breakdowns of 6532 are an attractive entry and this zone was a big low from September 2025.” We recovered this in the last half hour Friday and back up we went.
In today’s newsletter I’ll talk this, I’ll go over today’s Failed Breakdowns (these are key to know), and I’ll discuss the actionable plan for tomorrow

post_title: [Re-send] Bounces Got Sold Last Week. Is SPX Ready To Sustain One Now? March 23 Plan
